title: Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.41.0 to 1.42.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.41.0 to 1.42.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.42.0

What's Changed

  • build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runc from 1.1.1 to 1.1.2 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1238
  • Implement ReadMemInfo on FreeBSD by @​dfr in containers/storage#1239
  • Limited support for pkg/unshare on FreeBSD by @​dfr in containers/storage#1240
  • PullOptions should work for rootless users also by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1241
  • style clean up in storage.conf code by @​vrothberg in containers/storage#1229
  • build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.9.2 to 0.9.3 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1243
  • Fix codespell errors by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1245
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.4 to 1.15.5 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1247
  • storage.conf: respect CONTAINERS_STORAGE_CONF env by @​Luap99 in containers/storage#1249
  • Don't try to use %w in testing package logging functions by @​nalind in containers/storage#1250
  • Cirrus: use latest fedora and ubuntu releases by @​lsm5 in containers/storage#1248
  • [CI:DOCS] Document the pull_options by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1242
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.5 to 1.15.6 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1251
  • build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.7.1 to 1.7.2 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1252
  • Limited support for operating on images on macOS by @​slp in containers/storage#811
  • Bump opencontainers/runc to latest upstream commit by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1254
  • chunked: drop host dedup feature by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1256
  • Fix ReadMemInfo build for FreeBSD + nocgo by @​dfr in containers/storage#1260
  • Move skip_mount_home to overlay specific flag in man page by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1262
  • chown: use Link instead of Chown for dup inodes by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1258
  • drivers: enhance check for mount fs type by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1261
  • Make random value generation and use more reliable by @​mtrmac in containers/storage#1065
  • idtools: add lookup by UID with libsubid by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1265
  • build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.7.2 to 1.7.4 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1267
  • build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.7.4 to 1.7.5 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1269
  • overlay: create linkDir with mask 0755 by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1271
  • build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.7.5 to 1.8.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1273
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.6 to 1.15.7 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1272
  • options: copy all options on explicit config file by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1279
  • drivers/quota.makeBackingFsDev(): use mknod+rename by @​nalind in containers/storage#1280
  • Switch to golang native error wrapping by @​saschagrunert in containers/storage#1282
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz from 0.11.4 to 0.12.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1283
  • Wrap errors properly with fmt.Errorf by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1284
  • Only return errors when they exists by @​rhatdan in containers/storage#1285
  • Fix wrong error return value by @​saschagrunert in containers/storage#1286
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.7 to 1.15.8 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1290
  • diff: create missing layers dirs with 0755 by @​giuseppe in containers/storage#1289
  • Do not error if no default storage.conf exists by @​saschagrunert in containers/storage#1287
  • update github.com/opencontainers/runc to 1.1.3 to resolve CVE-2022-29162 by @​kcboyle in containers/storage#1291
  • build(deps): bump github.com/sirupsen/logrus from 1.8.1 to 1.9.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1293
  • Fix missing error check in device mapper by @​saschagrunert in containers/storage#1294
  • build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.8 to 1.15.9 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1296
  • build(deps): bump github.com/BurntSushi/toml from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0 by @​dependabot in containers/storage#1295

New Contributors

  • @​Luap99 made their first contribution in containers/storage#1249
  • @​slp made their first contribution in containers/storage#811
  • @​kcboyle made their first contribution in containers/storage#1291

... (truncated)

Commits
  • 53f8bec Bump to v1.42.0
  • 0e7f5da Merge pull request #1295 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/Bur...
  • c9695dc Merge pull request #1296 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/kla...
  • bc3a1a7 Merge pull request #1294 from saschagrunert/err-wrap
  • 070d22a build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.15.8 to 1.15.9
  • 6790209 build(deps): bump github.com/BurntSushi/toml from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0
  • 42b530b Fix missing error check in device mapper
  • be0efbc Merge pull request #1293 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/sir...
  • 3b67a0c build(deps): bump github.com/sirupsen/logrus from 1.8.1 to 1.9.0
  • b10c469 Merge pull request #1291 from kcboyle/main
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view
